mapper.sql: id, `name`, logo, address, phone, business_hours, `status`, create_time, update_time, business_scope, parking_info, introduction
mapper.select: SELECT s.*, IFNULL(t.order_cnt, 0) AS order_cnt FROM shop AS s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT shop_id, COUNT(*) AS order_cnt FROM `order` GROUP BY shop_id ) AS t ON s.id = t.shop_id ORDER BY t.order_cnt DESC, s.id ASC LIMIT 30;

SELECT DISTINCT shop.id FROM shop LEFT JOIN product_category ON shop.id = product_category.shop_id
product_category.name like CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT shop.id, shop.`name`, pc.id as category_id, pc.`name` as category_name FROM shop LEFT JOIN product_category pc ON shop.id = pc.shop_id WHERE shop.id IN
#{shopId}

SELECT c.id,a.create_time,b.description,b.price,d.phone,d.nickname FROM shop a INNER JOIN product b oN a.id=b.shop_id INNER JOIN shopping_cart c ON c.product_id=b.id INNER JOIN `user` d ON c.user_id=d.id WHERE a.id=#{id} and b.stock!=0 and b.`status`!=0
AND c.id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cid}, '%')
AND d.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND d.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as orders FROM `order` WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND status IN (0,1,2,4) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time)

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, SUM(total_amount) as sales FROM `order` WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time)

SELECT oi.product_id, p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) as sales, SUM(oi.amount) as revenue FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE o.shop_id = #{shopId} AND o.status IN (2, 4) GROUP BY oi.product_id, p.name ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10
